name: signalos
description: Personal high-signal intelligence pipeline for daily AI/developer briefs.

scripts.check: node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/store.js && node --check src/ingest/rss.js && node --check src/ingest/page.js && node --check src/ingest/youtube.js && node --check src/summarize.js && node --check src/score.js && node --check src/brief.js && node --check src/media.js
scripts.test: node tests/rss.test.js && node tests/page.test.js && node tests/youtube.test.js
scripts.smoke: node src/cli.js init --force && node src/cli.js sources list && node src/cli.js run --dry-run --offline
